dashboard.subtitle: Here's an overview of your CGI 242 space

actions.simulateDesc: IS, ITS, VAT, Payroll, License, IRCM and 9 more

tip.title: Tip of the day
tip.text: Use the Payroll simulator to generate a full payslip with automatic CNSS + ITS calculation.

code.title: Tax Code
code.selectInSommaire: Select an item in the table of contents
code.navigateTree: Navigate the General Tax Code tree
code.selectSubSection: Select a sub-section to see articles.

simulateur.title: Simulators
simulateur.subtitle: Simulate your taxes according to the Congo-Brazzaville Tax Code
simulateur.upgradeRequired: Simulator not included in your plan. Upgrade to Professional.

paie.title: Payroll Simulator
paie.subtitle: Full payslip — CGI Congo 2026
paie.description: Payslip simulator compliant with CGI 2026. ITS calculation (Art. 116 scale), CNSS, TUS, TOL, CAMU, employer charges. Benefits in kind per Art. 115.
paie.legalRef: Art. 114-A (exemptions), Art. 115 (benefits in kind), Art. 116 (ITS scale)
paie.disabledMajor: Of which adult disabled children (1 part each)
paie.enterSalary: Enter a base salary to see results

its.title: ITS Simulator
its.subtitle: Employment Income Tax - Art. 116 CGI 2026
its.description: ITS is calculated using the progressive scale Art. 116 CGI 2026, after CNSS deduction (4%) and professional expenses (20%).
its.disabledMajor: Of which adult disabled children (1 part each)
its.enterSalary: Enter a gross salary to see results

is.title: Minimum perception
is.subtitle: Quarterly IS / IBA instalments
is.descriptionIS: IS minimum perception: 1% of revenue (Art. 86-C §3). Paid in 4 quarterly instalments (Art. 86-C §5). Creditable against IS at settlement.
is.descriptionIBA: IBA minimum perception: 1.5% of revenue (Art. 95 §4). Same provisions as IS (Art. 95 §6) — 4 quarterly instalments.
is.enterProducts: Enter revenue to calculate the minimum perception

patente.title: Business License Simulator
patente.subtitle: Business License Contribution - Art. 314 CGI 2026
patente.description: License calculated on turnover excl. tax (Y-1). Progressive scale Art. 314. Additional centimes 5% (Art. 369 bis). Deadline: April 10-20.
patente.newCompanyDesc: Business license exemption for 3 years (Art. 278 al. 4)
patente.exemptionDesc: New companies are exempt from the business license contribution for the first three years of activity (Art. 278 al. 4 CGI).

solde.title: Settlement balance
solde.subtitle: IS calculated on tax result - instalments paid (Art. 86A & 86G)
solde.description: AR = Revenue − Expenses. TR = AR + Reinstatements − Deductions − DDA − Loss carry-forward. IS is applied to TR, then instalments paid are deducted.
solde.balanceNote: To be paid voluntarily after filing (Art. 86G)
solde.enterResult: Enter taxable income to see calculation

ircm.title: IRCM Simulator
ircm.subtitle: Securities Income Tax - Art. 103-110A
ircm.description: IRCM applies to dividends and interest (15%) and capital gains on securities (10%). Final withholding tax (Art. 110A).
ircm.enterAmount: Enter a gross amount to see calculation

irfLoyers.title: Rental Income Tax
irfLoyers.subtitle: Property Income Tax (Rent) - Art. 111-113A
irfLoyers.description: Rental income tax is 9% on gross rent. Withheld at source by corporate tenants (Art. 113A). No deduction for expenses.
irfLoyers.enterRent: Enter annual gross rent to see calculation

taxeImmo.title: Property Levy Simulator
taxeImmo.subtitle: Property levy on rentals - Tax Code Vol.2, Book 4, Art. 1-11
taxeImmo.description: The property levy equals 1/12th of annual rent (Art. 1). Paid by the tenant on behalf of the owner (Art. 5). Split 50% to State budget and 50% to local authorities (Art. 4). 50% surcharge for late payment (Art. 9).
taxeImmo.legalRef: Tax Code Vol.2, Book 4, Art. 1-11 (Property levy on rentals)
taxeImmo.enterRent: Enter annual rent to see calculation

iba.title: IBA Simulator
iba.subtitle: Business Profit Tax - Art. 93-102
iba.description: IBA taxes business profits at 30% (Art. 95). AR = Revenue − Expenses. TR = AR + Reinstatements − Deductions − DDA − Loss carry-forward. Minimum perception 1.5% (Art. 95). ASDI (3%) deductible.
iba.legalRef: Art. 93 (principle), Art. 94 (TR determination, 3-year carry-forward), Art. 95 (30% rate, 1.5% minimum), Art. 1-9 TFNC4 (ASDI 3%)
iba.taxCreditNote: Excess creditable on next fiscal year
iba.balanceNote: Due to DGI before May 20 Y+1
iba.enterTurnover: Enter operating revenue to see calculation

tva.title: VAT Simulator
tva.subtitle: Value Added Tax - TFNC6 Art. 1-40
tva.description: French-style VAT return. Congo VAT: 18%. Enter your operations and input VAT to calculate the balance due or credit to carry forward.
tva.ligne10: 10. VAT on other goods and services
tva.centimesNote: Additional centimes (5% of output VAT) are paid to local authorities and are not deductible (Art. 38-A TFNC6).
tva.deadlineNote: Monthly filing by the 15th of following month (Art. 461 bis)
tva.enterRevenue: Enter your transactions to generate the return

igf.title: IGF Simulator
igf.subtitle: Global Flat Tax - Art. 5 TFNC4
igf.description: IGF applies to individuals under the flat-rate regime (Art. 1). Rate: 5% of annual turnover excl. tax, or 8% of gross margin excl. tax (Art. 5 §5). Paid in 4 quarterly installments (Art. 3bis).
igf.paymentNote: Payment in 4 installments: March 20, June 20, September 20, December 20 (Art. 3bis)

enreg.title: Registration Duties
enreg.subtitle: Registration Duties - Volume 2, Book 1
enreg.description: Registration duties apply to contracts (1%), leases (3%), real estate transfers (8% or 2-3% registered), business funds (10%) and share transfers (5%). Additional cents of 5%.
enreg.legalRef: Vol. 2, Book 1, Ch. 11 (Art. 213-267), Art. 216 bis (additional cents 5%)
enreg.deadlineNote: Registration deadline: 3 months after deed signature
enreg.enterAmount: Enter the deed amount to see calculation

cessionParts.title: Share Transfers
cessionParts.subtitle: Share and stock transfer duties
cessionParts.description: Registration duty calculation on share and stock transfers. Flat rate of 5% (Art. 214 CGI). Minimum collection of 1,000,000 FCFA for petroleum contracts (Art. 214 bis). Additional cents of 5% (Art. 216 bis).
cessionParts.enterAmount: Enter the transfer price to see calculation

foncier.title: Property Tax
foncier.subtitle: CFPB and CFPNB - Built and unbuilt properties
foncier.description: Calculation of Built Property Tax (CFPB, Art. 257-262) and Unbuilt Property Tax (CFPNB, Art. 270-275). 75% deduction on rental value (built) or 50% (urban unbuilt). Max communal rate 20% (built) or 40% (unbuilt).
foncier.underMinimum: Tax below minimum of 1,000 FCFA — Not due
foncier.enterData: Enter data to see the calculation

rts.title: Withholding Tax
rts.subtitle: Withholding Tax — Art. 86-D, Art. 183, TFNC4
rts.description: Withholding tax applies: 20% on fees and royalties paid to non-residents (Art. 86-D), 10% on fees paid to residents not subject to corporate tax (Art. 183), and 10% on Treasury payments for public contracts (TFNC4).
rts.legalRef: Art. 86-D (non-residents 20%), Art. 183 (not subject to CT 10%), TFNC4 (Treasury 10%)
rts.enterAmount: Enter an amount excl. tax to see calculation

organization.deleteConfirm: Delete the organization? This action is reversible for 30 days.
organization.permanentDeleteConfirm: Permanently delete the organization? This action is IRREVERSIBLE.
organization.noSeatsAvailable: No seats available. Contact your administrator to increase the number of seats.
organization.noSeatsMessage: No seats available. Contact your administrator to increase the number of seats.

audit.cleanupConfirmMessage: Delete audit logs older than {{days}} days? This action is irreversible.

profil.title: My profile
profil.nameRequired: First name and last name are required

offline.banner: Offline mode — Tax Code and simulators remain accessible

calendrier.title: Tax Calendar 2026
calendrier.subtitle: Tax deadlines — CGI Congo-Brazzaville
calendrier.description: Find all 2026 tax deadlines according to the General Tax Code of Congo-Brazzaville.
calendrier.legalRef: Art. 461 bis LF 2026 (15th of month, August 20th), Art. 86C (IS), Art. 314 (Business License)
calendrier.aucuneEcheance: No tax deadline on this day
calendrier.selectDay: Select a date to view tax obligations

desc.isT1: Quarterly IS instalment (Q1). Art. 86C CGI — 10% penalty for late payment (Art. 86E).
desc.isT2: Quarterly IS instalment (Q2). Art. 86C CGI — 10% penalty for late payment.
desc.isT3: Quarterly IS instalment (Q3). Art. 86C CGI — 10% penalty for late payment.
desc.isT4: Quarterly IS instalment (Q4). Art. 86C CGI — 10% penalty for late payment.
desc.tva: Monthly VAT return and payment. Art. 461 bis LF 2026 — Due by the 15th of the following month.
desc.centimesTva: Additional 5% cents on collected VAT. Art. 38-A TFNC6 — For local authorities.
desc.its: Monthly ITS return and payment. Art. 116 CGI scale — Withheld at source by the employer.
desc.cnss: Monthly CNSS contributions. Employee + employer share — Due by the 15th of the following month.
desc.tus: Single Wage Tax (7.5% residents / 6% non-residents). Monthly payment due by the 15th.
desc.retenue: Withholding tax on payments to non-residents (20%, Art. 86-D) and services (10%, Art. 183).
desc.ircm: Monthly IRCM — Dividends 15%, interest 15%, capital gains 10%. Art. 103-110A CGI.
desc.isParaMensuel: Monthly instalment of forfaitaire IS for oil subcontractors (Art. 92-B). Base 22% of revenue × 33% / 12.
desc.ircmParaMensuel: Monthly instalment of forfaitaire IRCM for oil subcontractors (Art. 9 ter T2L3). Deemed distribution 70% × 15% / 12.
desc.accises: Excise duties on tobacco, alcoholic and non-alcoholic beverages. TFNC6 — Monthly return.
desc.camu: Monthly CAMU contribution (0.5%). Art. 3-4 CAMU law — Universal health insurance.
desc.transfertsFonds: Tax on fund transfers out of Congo (1.5%). Annex XV CGI — Monthly return.
desc.assurance: Tax on insurance contracts. Art. 336 T2L1 — Monthly payment by insurers.
desc.jeux: Tax on games of chance (10%). Annex XIII CGI — Monthly return by operators.
desc.rav: Audiovisual levy (RAV). Annex XII CGI — Monthly withholding on wages.
desc.telecom: Tax on electronic communications traffic. Monthly payment by operators.
desc.taxeRegionale: Regional tax on residents. Art. 250 bis — Withheld in January by the employer.
desc.soldeIS: IS settlement balance. Art. 86-G — Payment upon filing the return (Art. 86-F: 4 months after year-end).
desc.iba: Annual IBA return. Art. 93-102 — Industrial, commercial and agricultural income.
desc.soldeIBA: Annual IBA balance (Art. 200). Payment between May 10-20 after deducting monthly instalments.
desc.das: Annual Salary Declaration (DAS). Art. 176, 179, 180 CGI — Wages, benefits in kind, fees paid.
desc.declarationIS: IS results filing. Art. 86-F CGI — 4 months after year-end (April 30 for Dec 31 year-end).
desc.igf1: IGF 1st quarterly payment. Art. 3bis TFNC4 — 5% of revenue or 8% of margin.
desc.patente: Annual business license payment. Art. 314 CGI — Due from April 10 to 20.
desc.centimesPatente: Additional 5% cents on business license. Art. 369 bis — 20% chambers of commerce, 80% local authorities.
desc.cfpb: Property tax on built and unbuilt properties. Art. 257 bis, 270 CGI.
desc.irf1: Rental Income Tax — 1st instalment. Art. 111-113A CGI — 9% withholding.
desc.irf2: Rental Income Tax — 2nd instalment. Art. 111-113A CGI — Due by August 20.
desc.irf3: Rental Income Tax — 3rd instalment. Art. 111-113A CGI — Last instalment of the year.

landing.heroTitle: The General Tax Code of Congo
landing.heroSubtitle: Browse 2,181 articles of the 2026 CGI, simulate your taxes and ask our intelligent assistant your tax questions.
landing.featuresSubtitle: A complete platform to master Congolese taxation.
landing.feat1Desc: Access the entire General Tax Code of Congo, updated for 2026.
landing.feat2Desc: Read articles continuously, chapter by chapter, like a book.
landing.feat3Desc: Find an article by dictating your search out loud.
landing.feat4Desc: ITS, IS, Patente, VAT, IRCM, IRF, IBA, IGF, Registration, Land tax and more.
landing.feat5Desc: Ask your tax questions and get sourced answers instantly.
landing.feat6Desc: Never miss a tax deadline with automatic reminders.
landing.feat7Desc: Manage your firm or company with collaborative access.
landing.feat8Desc: Read comfortably day and night with the adaptive theme.
landing.feat9Desc: Browse articles even without an internet connection.
landing.feat10Desc: Available on all your devices, with automatic sync.
landing.pricingSubtitle: Start for free, upgrade to Premium for full access
